reason: Browser Use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to example.com, retrieved the page title, and reported back "Example Domain" within expected timeframe.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - page loaded successfully with SuperAgent UI displaying agent list
Found "QA-20260526-222203-walu" agent in sidebar and main content area - agent visible and clickable
Clicked on the agent - agent interface opened with chat input field
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - message entered successfully in input field
Sent message using Ctrl+Enter - message transmitted and agent status changed to "working"
Waited 2 seconds - agent began processing, tool calls started appearing
Waited 5 more seconds - tool call cards visible for "Open Browser", "Browser MCP: Browser Get State", and "Close Browser"
Waited 5 more seconds - agent completed execution with response "The page title is "Example Domain"" - response verified to mention "Example Domain" as expected
